title: Argentinian Empanada Pie
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, this pie is filled with melted cheese and sweet argentinian ingredients.

ingredients.name: Sweet Argentinian Ingredients
ingredients.notes: diced onions, bell peppers, and tomatoes

instructions: Roll out empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim edges.
In a separate bowl, mix melted cheese, sweet argentinian ingredients, and goat cheese.
Pour cheese mixture into pie crust.
Brush edges of crust with olive oil.
Fold crust edges up over filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until crust is golden brown.
